Work With Me

Mindful eating · Functional nutrition · Movement

Joud Bitar

Supporting women through nutrition, physiology, and movement.

A science-led, body-aware approach designed to help you build consistency without restriction.

Explore Programs About Joud

The approach

No rules. Only awareness.

"Understanding the body requires more than rules or restrictions."

Joud's work integrates mindful eating, functional nutrition, hormonal awareness, and strength-based movement to help women reconnect with how their bodies actually function.

Her approach is grounded in physiology, awareness, and sustainable change. No quick fixes or rigid protocols.

Read Joud's story

In Joud's words

"I built this work because I kept seeing women who were doing everything right, by someone else's rules, and still feeling disconnected from their bodies. This is not about fixing you. It is about helping you understand yourself."

— Joud Bitar

The Framework

This is not a diet.
It is a framework.

01

Mindful Eating

Develop awareness at meals, recognise hunger and fullness cues, and reduce stress around food.

02

Functional Nutrition

Prioritise protein, nutrient-dense meals, and balanced eating patterns to support steady energy and metabolic health.

03

Hormonal Awareness

Understand how nutrition, stress, sleep, and daily habits influence hormonal balance and overall well-being.

04

Strength & Movement

Build strength and integrate functional movement to support resilience, mobility, and metabolic health.

Mindful by Joud Nutrition & Coaching

Mindful Eating & Functional Nutrition

Feel your best,
inside and out.

Whether you prefer structured group learning or individualised support, the programs are designed to help you build sustainable habits around nutrition, movement, and overall well-being.

The work restores clarity around hunger, metabolism, hormones, and daily nutrition decisions.

Ways to work together

Group Programs

Structured, supportive cohorts or self-paced formats.

  • Weekly educational sessions
  • Practical nutrition guidance
  • Structured program framework
  • Community accountability
Explore Programs

1:1 Work

Personalised guidance tailored to your body and goals.

  • Initial assessment & intake
  • Personalised nutrition strategy
  • Ongoing coaching sessions
  • Habit-building support
Work 1:1

Strength & Fitness

Movement through
the Inhale Method

Strength-based movement that emphasises control, breath, and alignment.

Movement is approached as a way to support physical resilience, metabolic health, and long-term body awareness. Not performance metrics or aesthetic targets.

Explore Strength & Movement
Inhale Method

No rules. Only awareness.

"Your body gives feedback every day. My role is to help you understand it. Not override it."

Health is not built through extremes. The body responds best to consistency, awareness, and structure. This work helps you understand how your body responds to food, movement, and daily habits. The goal is not control or restriction. The goal is understanding.

Functional Nutrition Hormonal Awareness Mindful Eating Strength-Based Movement Behavioural Change

Is this right for you?

Who are these programs for?

Clients often describe feeling clearer, more confident in their choices, and more connected to how their body functions.

Explore the programs

This work is for you if

  • You are tired of dieting cycles
  • You want structure without restriction
  • You want to understand your body, not override it
  • You value evidence-based guidance
  • You are ready to observe your patterns honestly

This is not for you if

  • You want rapid weight loss without behavioural change
  • You are looking for a meal plan only
  • You are not willing to observe patterns honestly
